description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Passenger generic binaries CI that runs on every push. The workflow should have two jobs: build_linux and build_macos. The build_linux job should run on ubuntu-24.04 and ubuntu-24.04-arm, and the build_macos job should run on macos-13 and macos-14. Each job should check out the repository, fetch and update cache, build and test passenger binaries, and upload artifacts.
